actions.before: knowledge/knowledge-hq-core/ — plain directory (not a symlink, not a git repo) containing one file: systems-access.md
actions.after: systems-access.md copied to knowledge/hq-core/systems-access.md; knowledge/hq-core/INDEX.md updated to include entry; knowledge/knowledge-hq-core/ directory removed; staged as git rename knowledge/knowledge-hq-core/systems-access.md -> knowledge/hq-core/systems-access.md
actions.notes: Neither knowledge/hq-core nor knowledge/knowledge-hq-core were symlinks — both were plain directories embedded in HQ git. No separate knowledge repo commits needed. Changes staged in HQ git.

actions.before: projects/distributed-tracking/ — active entry in projects/INDEX.md; contained only context/ subdirectory (no prd.json)
actions.after: git mv to projects/_archive/distributed-tracking/; projects/INDEX.md updated to show status=archived; staged in HQ git

actions.before: workspace/metrics/ — directory with only test-coverage.jsonl (sparse); no INDEX.md
actions.after: workspace/metrics/INDEX.md created documenting purpose, expected files (test-coverage.jsonl, model-usage.jsonl, audit-log.jsonl, metrics.jsonl), format (JSONL), and which commands write to each file; staged in HQ git

actions.before: workspace/ralph-test/ — contained COMPLETE.md and hello.txt; leftover test artifacts from Pure Ralph Loop validation project
actions.after: git mv to workspace/_archive/ralph-test/; staged in HQ git

summary.notes: All 4 actions affected HQ git (not separate knowledge repos). Changes are staged but not committed per instructions — orchestrator handles commit.
